title: Instagram App - App Store
html_text:
Instagram

Videos, creators & friends

Free · In‑App Purchases

  • 29M Ratings
    4.7
  • Ages
    13+
    In-App Controls
  • Category
    Photo & Video
  • Developer
    Instagram, Inc.
  • Language
    EN
    + 30 More
  • Size
    563.6
    MB

Little moments lead to big friendships. Share yours on Instagram. — From Meta Connect with friends, find other fans, and see what people around you are up to and into. Explore your interests and post what's going on, from your daily moments to life's highlights. Share what you’re up to and into: - Turn your life into a movie and discover short, entertaining videos on Instagram with Reels. - Keep up with friends on the fly with Stories and Notes that disappear after 24 hours. - Start group chats and share unfiltered moments with your Close Friends. - Share memories from recent events or trips in Feed. - Customize your posts with exclusive templates, music, stickers and filters. Dive into your interests. - Watch videos from your favorite creators and discover new content that’s personalized to your interests. - Get inspired by photos and videos from new accounts in Explore. - Discover brands and small businesses, and shop products that are relevant to your personal style. Some Instagram features may not be available in your country or region. Terms and Policies: https://help.instagram.com/581066165581870 Consumer Health Privacy Policy: https://privacycenter.instagram.com/policies/health Learn how we're working to help keep our communities safe across Meta technologies at the Instagram Safety Center: https://about.instagram.com/safety

Ratings & Reviews

  • 4.7
    out of 5
    29M Ratings

  • Creative and User-Enhancing Suggestions

    07/01/2024

    wucls

    Dear Instagram Developers, I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to offer a few suggestions that I believe would greatly benefit and enhance the functionality of Instagram. Firstly, I propose the inclusion of a feature that would allow users to add music to their profiles. This addition would undoubtedly add a whole new dimension of creativity and personalization, empowering users to express themselves through their favorite tunes. Secondly, I would like to address a concern regarding the white circle that surrounds the profile photo. In my opinion, this visual element can sometimes disrupt the overall aesthetic and proportion of the photo. I respectfully suggest that the option to remove or customize this circle be made available, allowing users to further curate their profiles in alignment with their personal branding. Last but not least, I would like to express my desire for Instagram to support the option of using GIFs as profile photos. This animated form of self-expression would undoubtedly inject a playful and engaging element into users' profiles, increasing their appeal and individuality. I genuinely believe that these proposals could positively impact the Instagram user experience, fostering increased creativity and allowing for further personalization. I appreciate your time and consideration, and I eagerly look forward to seeing the continued evolution of the platform. Thank you for your attention to these suggestions.

    Creative and User-Enhancing Suggestions

    07/01/2024

    wucls

    Dear Instagram Developers, I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to offer a few suggestions that I believe would greatly benefit and enhance the functionality of Instagram. Firstly, I propose the inclusion of a feature that would allow users to add music to their profiles. This addition would undoubtedly add a whole new dimension of creativity and personalization, empowering users to express themselves through their favorite tunes. Secondly, I would like to address a concern regarding the white circle that surrounds the profile photo. In my opinion, this visual element can sometimes disrupt the overall aesthetic and proportion of the photo. I respectfully suggest that the option to remove or customize this circle be made available, allowing users to further curate their profiles in alignment with their personal branding. Last but not least, I would like to express my desire for Instagram to support the option of using GIFs as profile photos. This animated form of self-expression would undoubtedly inject a playful and engaging element into users' profiles, increasing their appeal and individuality. I genuinely believe that these proposals could positively impact the Instagram user experience, fostering increased creativity and allowing for further personalization. I appreciate your time and consideration, and I eagerly look forward to seeing the continued evolution of the platform. Thank you for your attention to these suggestions.

  • My problem

    08/21/2023

    KylaRay

    Instagram is a really good app and I love it but I had a problem recently… Someone made an account pretending to be me they used one my pictures from my page and used my name and middle name as well, at first I thought it was a friend but then I realized it was someone else I reported that account but they didn’t take the account down. I also asked everyone I follow, friends almost everyone on Instagram to report the account which they did and the account was still not taken down! I had people after people after people reporting this account and they still would not take the account down after a while I gave up because I’m not gonna waste my time if you guys aren’t doing anything about it. A couple weeks later I had a message request from that account making a joke about it saying “Hey can you stop pretending to be me!?” And then they said “nah I’m just kidding I don’t wanna be you anymore, here’s the password to this account” and the password to the account actually worked there wasn’t no email or phone number which was odd. I’m glad this person stopped pretending to be me! But that is not the point. That person can be pretending to be someone else as I type this right now and the fact that you guys didn’t do anything to try and help is sickening honestly. Honestly love the app but you guys gotta do better people should not be able to pretend be someone else and then when we ask for you to take there account down you refuse very unhappy with that. Hope this review helped just be careful especially with your children on this app, Thank you.

  • If I could give it zero stars I would

    12/19/2019

    cryptickaren

    I had Instagram in the past and then deleted my old account. I made a new one recently and it has been a total nightmare. Worst app ever. I have to blame the new updates that try to catch, shadow ban, and restrict bot accounts because this app seems to have NO efficient way of telling apart a bot account versus a REAL account. That’s probably why I was blocked from doing so many things like following people, unfollowing people, liking photos, captioning my photos, etc. which makes having a profile on this app completely pointless. Definitely overly measured and overly penalized, when all I did was unfollow like 16 people I DIDN’T want to follow any longer. My personal choice. Why should Instagram feel the need to dictate my account? That is extremely unfair and defeats the purpose of free expression. How is me doing such a simple thing many do harming the community in this app? Makes no sense. If I don’t want to follow multiple people, I should be able to do that because it’s suppose to be MY account, therefore, MY choice. Unless you guys thought I was a bot, which again is a poor examination on YOUR part. Terrible experience. For the further reasons that trying to get this issue fixed seems impossible with such an unapproachable help center/establishment. I’ve reached out MULTIPLE times and you guys haven’t fixed squat. You guys have turned this app into pure TRASH. Thanks a lot. So much for a save community for “everyone”. Fix your system.

  • Some things to fix

    03/29/2019

    xTrash_Panduhx

    So there are MANY nsfw accounts on instagram....if you report it for sexual pornography it will say "we reviewed your report and found that it done not violate our community guidelines". Tf?! A LINE IN YOUR GUIDELINES SAY "no pornographic content" so uncensored yiff (2 animals having s*x and actually showing EVERYTHING) Is considered appropriate? And if you report too much, your acc gets banned for "false" reports. Another problem i have. I have multiple accounts, a fandom account and a regular account. I have my fandom account logged in but i can not log into my main account as it says "error. Something went wrong". On my other device i tried to log in to my main and had the same message. I deleted the app off another device and reinstalled it to see if that was the problem. I tried logging into my main account again and i still received the error message. I tired to make a new account but every time i would click "done", it would say "you can not create a account right now because you have violated our terms and service". AND one of my accounts got disabled for no reason. I filled out the form to request it to be put back up (i filled it out 5 months ago) and i am STILL waiting. I did nothing wrong to deserve this. Instagram has been becoming worse every update. I am about to delete this app and use facebook instead because Facebook is better and gives me no trouble with my account. And they actually LISTEN to the problems people have with FB and actually TRY to help solve them. Do not install app!!! Its a waste!

gold_text: Instagram Videos, creators & friends Free In-App Purchases Little moments lead to big friendships. Share yours on Instagram. - From Meta Connect with friends, find other fans, and see what people around you are up to and into. Explore your interests and post what's going on, from your daily moments to life's highlights. Share what you're up to and into: - Turn your life into a movie and discover short, entertaining videos on Instagram with Reels. - Keep up with friends on the fly with Stories and Notes that disappear after 24 hours. - Start group chats and share unfiltered moments with your Close Friends. - Share memories from recent events or trips in Feed. - Customize your posts with exclusive templates, music, stickers and filters. Dive into your interests. - Watch videos from your favorite creators and discover new content that's personalized to your interests. - Get inspired by photos and videos from new accounts in Explore. - Discover brands and small businesses, and shop products that are relevant to your personal style. Some Instagram features may not be available in your country or region. Terms and Policies: https://help.instagram.com/581066165581870 Consumer Health Privacy Policy: https://privacycenter.instagram.com/policies/health Learn how we're working to help keep our communities safe across Meta technologies at the Instagram Safety Center: https://about.instagram.com/safety What's New > Performance optimizations and stability improvements for a smoother, more reliable experience.
